spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and runner with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with Spring Boot 3.0 requirements.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: Changed @RunWith(SpringRunner.class) to @ExtendWith(SpringExtension.class) and updated imports from org.junit to org.junit.jupiter.api.

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and assertions with JUnit 5 equivalents to support Spring Boot 3.
Replace JUnit 4 SpringRunner with JUnit 5 SpringExtension for test context loading.
Remove deprecated secure=false attribute from WebMvcTest and add WithMockUser for security context.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Prefix in-memory passwords with {noop} to satisfy Spring Security 5.8+ / Spring Boot 3.0 requirements for explicit password encoding.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update import for LocalServerPort to reflect the package restructuring in Spring Boot 3.
Add @WithMockUser to provide a default security context for the test, replacing the deprecated secure=false attribute.
Remove the deprecated 'secure' attribute from @WebMvcTest as it is no longer supported in Spring Boot 3.

spring-boot-web-application/src/main/jav.general_idea: Explicitly set a NoOpPasswordEncoder to satisfy Spring Security 5.8+ requirements that mandate a password encoder for in-memory authentication.
